message: Here are 10 brutal, no-fluff cold outreach messages:

1.  
Your front desk is costing you $4k/month in missed calls and no-shows. I’ll replace it with an AI that books appointments 24/7 for less than $500. Want me to show you the numbers for your business?

2.  
You’re still paying someone to answer the same five questions every day. I can make that stop this week. Reply if you want to see what your current setup is actually costing you.

3.  
Most local businesses lose 30-40% of leads because they’re slow to respond. My AI answers and qualifies in under 60 seconds. How many leads did you lose last month?

4.  
Stop paying staff to chase reviews and follow-ups. I’ll set up an automated system that does it for you while you sleep. Interested or keep burning money?

5.  
Your competitors are already using AI to book jobs while you’re still checking voicemails. I can flip that in 10 days. Want the details?

6.  
You’re paying someone $18/hr to do work an AI can handle for $200/month. I’ll show you exactly what to automate first. Reply “yes” if you want the list.

7.  
Every day you wait, you’re losing customers to businesses that answer instantly. I build the instant-answer system. Do you want it or not?

8.  
Your current booking process is leaking money.
